name: agent-workforce
description: A gated AI workforce that routes software, research, operations, document, and ticket work through scoped specialist roles.

interface.shortDescription: Gated specialist workflows for complex work
interface.longDescription: Route work through architect, builder, debugger, verifier, reviewer, deployer, researcher, operations, scribe, and ticketing roles with explicit approval gates and evidence-based closeout.
defaultPrompt: Use the agent workforce to take this task from triage through verified completion.
Route this change through architecture, implementation, verification, and review.
Use the workforce to investigate this problem and return an evidence-backed answer.
